title: 10 best herbal creams for tendinitis
description: Devil's claw creams helps with tendinitis because of its anti-inflammatory properties, which directly target the affected area. The herb's unique compounds, such as harpagoside and clematistic acid, work to reduce swelling and ease pain in joints and tendons. Additionally, devil's claw has natural analgesic properties that help to numb the affected area, providing quick relief from discomfort.
